summary: C++ compilation failed while building pandas' SIMD moments code: explicit template instantiation for accumulate_moments_simd::operator() does not match the available template signature (neon64 vs neon), causing the build to stop.
root_cause: The build fails due to a C++ compile error: an explicit instantiation/declaration uses xsimd::neon64 while the candidate template/signature is for xsimd::neon, so the explicit instantiation does not match any function template.

evidence.quote: error: explicit instantiation of 'operator()' does not refer to a function template, variable template, member function, member class, or static data member
evidence.reason: Shows the compiler error that an explicit instantiation is invalid, i.e. the instantiation does not match any available template/function.
Shows the explicit instantiation/declaration is being made for xsimd::neon64 in moments_simd.hpp.

evidence.quote: note: candidate template ignored: could not match 'Moments (xsimd::neon64, std::span<const double>, int, std::optional<std::span<const uint8_t>>, int) noexcept' ... against 'Moments (xsimd::neon, std::span<const double>, int, std::optional<std::span<const uint8_t>>, int)'
evidence.reason: Shows the compiler's note that the available candidate template uses xsimd::neon (not neon64), demonstrating the mismatch causing the error.
Indicates which compilation unit failed during the build (moments_inst_neon.cpp), tying the error to the neon SIMD instantiation.
Shows the build terminated due to the compilation error.

suggested_fix: Make the SIMD template instantiation and declaration consistent: either change the explicit instantiation in ../../pandas/_libs/include/pandas/simd/moments_simd.hpp (and moments_inst_neon.cpp) to use xsimd::neon, or update the operator template/candidate to accept xsimd::neon64. Ensure the SIMD type name (xsimd::neon vs xsimd::neon64) is the same in the declaration and the instantiation for the accumulate_moments_simd operator.
